{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Mountain Sage
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Waybound (novel)|Waybound]]
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del’rek of the [[Shann]] is referred to as the [[Mountain Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Bow Sage. Mountain Sage. Dross tells me you kept trying to take pieces of the Dreadgod corpses.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
